title: Backend Systems
summary: Service-oriented thinking across JVM and Python-heavy work.
notes: This is where I spend most of my time: designing services, shaping APIs, and keeping systems understandable as they grow.

title: APIs & Data
summary: The layer where backend logic becomes queryable, useful, and measurable.
notes: These shows up in schema design, service contracts, and the data boundaries that make systems easier to evolve.

title: Reliability & Tooling
summary: Delivery, debugging, and workflows that make software less fragile.
notes: I use this layer to ship changes safely, debug production issues quickly, and keep delivery from becoming a source of pain.

title: Product & Interface Awareness
summary: Enough frontend and mobile depth to make systems visible and useful.
notes: I am not frontend-first, but I care about making technical work visible, usable, and connected to real user outcomes.
